description_long: This is a dark brown glass bottle with a cylindrical body and a long neck, featuring a worn and partially torn paper label on its front. The bottle has a rag or cloth protruding from its mouth, suggesting it may be intended as a Molotov cocktail. The label is heavily weathered, with discoloration and stains, making the text and graphics difficult to discern. The bottle's surface appears matte with some areas of grime or residue, indicating age or exposure to harsh conditions. The rag is dark and loosely inserted, with visible folds and texture. Overall, the object has a rugged, utilitarian appearance, suitable for an urban or post-apocalyptic setting.
description: A dark brown glass bottle with a weathered label and a rag stuffed in its neck, giving it a rugged, makeshift look.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen at an angle, showing the rag protruding from the neck and a partially visible, worn label on the front.
description_view_1: The bottle is viewed from the back, with the rag clearly visible and no label or markings apparent.
description_view_2: The bottle is angled to show the side, with the rag and a more complete view of the torn label visible.
description_view_3: The front of the bottle is shown, displaying the full, weathered label and the rag in the neck.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large, rectangular, heavily weathered and stained paper label on the front, with faded text and graphics; no clear branding visible.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible wear and discoloration on the label; no cracks or dents on the bottle itself.
